name: codex-project-harness
display_name: Codex 项目小队操作系统
description: A Codex-native code-delivery methodology plugin with project bootstrap, GitHub/Linear/Notion/Figma/Slack collaboration mapping, generated agent teams, reusable skills, quality gates, delivery readiness, and retrospectives. It stops at verified code handoff and does not perform deployment.
author: zygs1083-dotcom
